narrative:
Green Twp township has 2,271 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.5%, a clear Republican lean of 8.6 percentage points.
